task.summary: add more condition on refrain detection
fetch assets based on manifest.json, rebuild prod assets
add verse number on bottom left of slide
fix lyric copy (add ticks and ticks_f), check reff per language, only copy lyric if the verse is correct, put title a bit higher
add score normalizer, update to 2 measures setup

MESSAGE.value: add more condition on refrain detection
fetch assets based on manifest.json, rebuild prod assets
add verse number on bottom left of slide
fix lyric copy (add ticks and ticks_f), check reff per language, only copy lyric if the verse is correct, put title a bit higher
add score normalizer, update to 2 measures setup
